## Fillings.Converters.scaledFillingIngredient variable

Converter for [IScaledFillingIngredient](./ts-chocolate.fillings.iscaledfillingingredient.md)<!-- -->. Uses IIdsWithPreferred pattern for ingredient selection with validation.

**Signature:**

```typescript
scaledFillingIngredient: Converter<IScaledFillingIngredient>
```
